option.name: filePath
option.value: /AdminDashboardFragment (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /LoginFragment (snapshot).kt

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /fragment_admin_publish (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".ui.admin.AdminPublishFragment">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_publish_title" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceHeadlineSmall" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView style="@style/Widget.Apunili.CardView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/toggle_group_type" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" app:checkedButton="@+id/btn_type_activity" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_type_activity" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/menu_activities" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_type_event" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/menu_events" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:hint="@string/contact_subject">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_publish_title" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="text" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:hint="@string/contact_message">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_publish_description" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="top" android:inputType="textMultiLine" android:minLines="4" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:hint="@string/membership_birthdate" app:startIconDrawable="@drawable/ic_event">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_publish_date" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:focusable="false" android:inputType="none" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:hint="@string/membership_address" app:startIconDrawable="@drawable/ic_people">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_publish_location" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="text" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_publish" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:text="@string/admin_publish_confirm" app:cornerRadius="12dp" />
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".ui.admin.AdminPublishFragment">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/admin_publish_title" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceHeadlineSmall" android:textStyle="bold" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView style="@style/Widget.Apunili.CardView" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup android:id="@+id/toggle_group_type" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" app:checkedButton="@+id/btn_type_activity" app:singleSelection="true">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_type_activity" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/menu_activities" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_type_event" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/menu_events" /> </com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButtonToggleGroup>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:hint="@string/contact_subject">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_publish_title" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="text" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:hint="@string/contact_message">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_publish_description" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="top" android:inputType="textMultiLine" android:minLines="4" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:hint="@string/membership_birthdate" app:startIconDrawable="@drawable/ic_event">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_publish_date" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:focusable="false" android:inputType="none" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:hint="@string/membership_address" app:startIconDrawable="@drawable/ic_people">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/et_publish_location" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="text" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/til_category" style="@style/Widget.Material3.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox.ExposedDropdownMenu" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" android:hint="Catégorie">
<AutoCompleteTextView android:id="@+id/dropdown_category" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="none" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_publish" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:text="@string/admin_publish_confirm" app:cornerRadius="12dp" />
</LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /fragment_home (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".ui.home.HomeFragment">
<!-- MAIN CONTENT --> <androidx.swiperefreshlayout.widget.SwipeRefreshLayout android:id="@+id/swipe_refresh" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView android:id="@+id/scroll_view" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true" android:overScrollMode="never">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingBottom="24dp">
<!-- SECTION 1 : HERO BANNER --> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="220dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/bg_hero_banner_1" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="24dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" app:cardCornerRadius="32dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:contentDescription="@string/nav_header_desc" android:scaleType="centerCrop" app:srcCompat="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/home_hero_title" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:alpha="0.9" android:text="@string/home_hero_subtitle" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_join_us" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TonalButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_join_us" android:textColor="@color/md_theme_light_primary" android:textSize="12sp" app:backgroundTint="@color/white" app:cornerRadius="22dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_person_add" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconSize="18dp" app:iconTint="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="bottom" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="24dp" android:paddingBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_contact_us" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_contact_us" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="12sp" app:cornerRadius="22dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_contact_mail" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconSize="18dp" app:iconTint="@color/white" app:strokeColor="@color/white" /> </LinearLayout> </FrameLayout>
<!-- SECTION 2 : COMPTEURS STATISTIQUES --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:baselineAligned="false" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="2dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingVertical="14dp"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_stat_members_count" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/md_theme_light_primary" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_stat_members" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="6dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="2dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingVertical="14dp"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_stat_activities_count" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/md_theme_light_secondary" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_stat_activities" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="2dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingVertical="14dp"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_stat_events_count" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/md_theme_light_tertiary" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_stat_events" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
<!-- SECTION 3 : ACCES RAPIDE --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="20dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_access" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleMedium" android:textStyle="bold" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:baselineAligned="false" android:orientation="horizontal">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/quick_activities" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp"> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_quick_access_circle"> <ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="@string/home_quick_activities" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_volunteer" app:tint="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_activities" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/quick_events" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp"> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_quick_access_circle"> <ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="@string/home_quick_events" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_event" app:tint="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_events" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/quick_gallery" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp"> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_quick_access_circle"> <ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="@string/home_quick_gallery" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_photo_library" app:tint="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_gallery" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/quick_documents" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp"> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_quick_access_circle"> <ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="@string/home_quick_documents" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_document" app:tint="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_documents" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- SECTION 4 : NOTRE MISSION --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="?attr/colorOutline" app:strokeWidth="0.5dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_our_mission" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:textStyle="bold" /> <View android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="3dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:background="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" android:text="@string/home_mission_text" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- SECTION 4B : MOT DU PRESIDENT --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#F5F5FF" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_president_word_title" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:textStyle="bold" /> <View android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="3dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:background="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_president_word" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" android:maxLines="3" android:text="@string/home_president_word_text" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" android:textStyle="italic" /> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_read_more_president" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_read_more" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- SECTION 5 : DERNIERES ACTIVITES --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="20dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_latest_activities" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleMedium" android:textStyle="bold" /> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_see_all_activities" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_see_all" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_latest_activities" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:overScrollMode="never" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_empty_activities" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:padding="24dp" android:text="@string/home_no_activities" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" android:visibility="gone" />
<!-- SECTION 6 : PROCHAINS EVENEMENTS --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="20dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_upcoming_events" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleMedium" android:textStyle="bold" /> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_see_all_events" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_see_all" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_upcoming_events" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:overScrollMode="never" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_empty_events" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:padding="24dp" android:text="@string/home_no_events" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" android:visibility="gone" />
<!-- SECTION 7 : CTA REJOIGNEZ-NOUS --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_join_cta" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_join_cta_title" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:alpha="0.9" android:text="@string/home_join_cta_desc" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="13sp" /> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal"> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_cta_become_member" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TonalButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_become_member" android:textColor="@color/md_theme_light_primary" android:textSize="11sp" app:backgroundTint="@color/white" app:cornerRadius="22dp" /> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_cta_contact" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_contact_us" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="11sp" app:cornerRadius="22dp" app:strokeColor="@color/white" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- SECTION 8 : FOOTER --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_footer_card" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_follow_us" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal"> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btn_facebook" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF" app:cardCornerRadius="22dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <ImageView android:layout_width="22dp" android:layout_height="22dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="Facebook" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_facebook" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btn_whatsapp" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF" app:cardCornerRadius="22dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <ImageView android:layout_width="22dp" android:layout_height="22dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="WhatsApp" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_whatsapp" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btn_email" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF" app:cardCornerRadius="22dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <ImageView android:layout_width="22dp" android:layout_height="22dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="Email" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_email_outline" app:tint="@color/white" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btn_phone" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF" app:cardCornerRadius="22dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <ImageView android:layout_width="22dp" android:layout_height="22dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="Telephone" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_phone" app:tint="@color/white" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:alpha="0.8" android:text="@string/home_address" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="12sp" /> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0.5dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:alpha="0.3" android:background="@color/white" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:alpha="0.7" android:text="@string/home_copyright" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="11sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView> </androidx.swiperefreshlayout.widget.SwipeRefreshLayout> </FrameLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".ui.home.HomeFragment">
<!-- MAIN CONTENT --> <androidx.swiperefreshlayout.widget.SwipeRefreshLayout android:id="@+id/swipe_refresh" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView android:id="@+id/scroll_view" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:fillViewport="true" android:overScrollMode="never">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingBottom="24dp">
<!-- SECTION 1 : HERO BANNER --> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="220dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@drawable/bg_hero_banner_1" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="24dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" app:cardCornerRadius="32dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:contentDescription="@string/nav_header_desc" android:scaleType="centerCrop" app:srcCompat="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/home_hero_title" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:alpha="0.9" android:text="@string/home_hero_subtitle" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" />
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_join_us" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TonalButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_join_us" android:textColor="@color/md_theme_light_primary" android:textSize="12sp" app:backgroundTint="@color/white" app:cornerRadius="22dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_person_add" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconSize="18dp" app:iconTint="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="bottom" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal" android:paddingHorizontal="24dp" android:paddingBottom="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_contact_us" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_contact_us" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="12sp" app:cornerRadius="22dp" app:icon="@drawable/ic_contact_mail" app:iconGravity="textStart" app:iconSize="18dp" app:iconTint="@color/white" app:strokeColor="@color/white" /> </LinearLayout> </FrameLayout>
<!-- SECTION 2 : COMPTEURS STATISTIQUES --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:baselineAligned="false" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="6dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="2dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingVertical="14dp"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_stat_members_count" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/md_theme_light_primary" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_stat_members" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="6dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="2dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingVertical="14dp"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_stat_activities_count" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/md_theme_light_secondary" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_stat_activities" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="6dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="2dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingVertical="14dp"> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_stat_events_count" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="0" android:textColor="@color/md_theme_light_tertiary" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_stat_events" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
<!-- SECTION 3 : ACCES RAPIDE --> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="20dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_access" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleMedium" android:textStyle="bold" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:baselineAligned="false" android:orientation="horizontal">
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/quick_activities" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp"> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_quick_access_circle"> <ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="@string/home_quick_activities" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_volunteer" app:tint="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_activities" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/quick_events" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp"> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_quick_access_circle"> <ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="@string/home_quick_events" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_event" app:tint="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_events" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/quick_gallery" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp"> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_quick_access_circle"> <ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="@string/home_quick_gallery" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_photo_library" app:tint="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_gallery" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/quick_documents" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:background="?attr/selectableItemBackgroundBorderless" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="8dp"> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_quick_access_circle"> <ImageView android:layout_width="24dp" android:layout_height="24dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="@string/home_quick_documents" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_document" app:tint="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> </FrameLayout> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/home_quick_documents" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
<!-- SECTION 4 : NOTRE MISSION --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="?attr/colorOutline" app:strokeWidth="0.5dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_our_mission" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:textStyle="bold" /> <View android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="3dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:background="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" android:text="@string/home_mission_text" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- SECTION 4B : MOT DU PRESIDENT --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#F5F5FF" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="20dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_president_word_title" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorPrimary" android:textStyle="bold" /> <View android:layout_width="40dp" android:layout_height="3dp" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:background="@color/md_theme_light_primary" /> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_president_word" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" android:maxLines="3" android:text="@string/home_president_word_text" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" android:textStyle="italic" /> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_read_more_president" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_read_more" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- SECTION 5 : DERNIERES ACTIVITES --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="20dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_latest_activities" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleMedium" android:textStyle="bold" /> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_see_all_activities" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_see_all" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_latest_activities" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:overScrollMode="never" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_empty_activities" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:padding="24dp" android:text="@string/home_no_activities" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" android:visibility="gone" />
<!-- SECTION 6 : PROCHAINS EVENEMENTS --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="20dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal"> <TextView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_upcoming_events" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleMedium" android:textStyle="bold" /> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_see_all_events" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TextButton" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_see_all" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_upcoming_events" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" android:overScrollMode="never" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_empty_events" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="center" android:padding="24dp" android:text="@string/home_no_events" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyMedium" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" android:visibility="gone" />
<!-- SECTION 7 : CTA REJOIGNEZ-NOUS --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_join_cta" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_join_cta_title" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:alpha="0.9" android:text="@string/home_join_cta_desc" android:textAlignment="center" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="13sp" /> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal"> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_cta_become_member" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.TonalButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_become_member" android:textColor="@color/md_theme_light_primary" android:textSize="11sp" app:backgroundTint="@color/white" app:cornerRadius="22dp" /> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btn_cta_contact" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button.OutlinedButton" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/home_contact_us" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="11sp" app:cornerRadius="22dp" app:strokeColor="@color/white" /> </LinearLayout> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<!-- SECTION 8 : FOOTER --> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginHorizontal="16dp" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" app:cardCornerRadius="20dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_footer_card" android:gravity="center_horizontal" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp"> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_follow_us" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:gravity="center" android:orientation="horizontal"> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btn_facebook" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF" app:cardCornerRadius="22dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <ImageView android:layout_width="22dp" android:layout_height="22dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="Facebook" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_facebook" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btn_whatsapp" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF" app:cardCornerRadius="22dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <ImageView android:layout_width="22dp" android:layout_height="22dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="WhatsApp" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_whatsapp" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btn_email" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginEnd="10dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF" app:cardCornerRadius="22dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <ImageView android:layout_width="22dp" android:layout_height="22dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="Email" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_email_outline" app:tint="@color/white" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/btn_phone" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardBackgroundColor="#33FFFFFF" app:cardCornerRadius="22dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp"> <ImageView android:layout_width="22dp" android:layout_height="22dp" android:layout_gravity="center" android:contentDescription="Telephone" app:srcCompat="@drawable/ic_phone" app:tint="@color/white" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:alpha="0.8" android:text="@string/home_address" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="12sp" /> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0.5dp" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:alpha="0.3" android:background="@color/white" /> <TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:alpha="0.7" android:text="@string/home_copyright" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="11sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView> </androidx.swiperefreshlayout.widget.SwipeRefreshLayout> </FrameLayout>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /nav_header_main (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="176dp" android:background="@drawable/side_nav_bar" android:gravity="bottom" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imageView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:contentDescription="@string/nav_header_desc" android:paddingTop="8dp" app:srcCompat="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:text="@string/nav_header_title" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/textView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/nav_header_subtitle" /> </LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="176dp" android:background="@drawable/side_nav_bar" android:gravity="bottom" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imageView" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:contentDescription="@string/nav_header_desc" android:paddingTop="8dp" app:srcCompat="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_nav_header_title" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:paddingTop="8dp" android:text="@string/nav_header_title" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_nav_header_subtitle" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/nav_header_subtitle" android:textColor="@android:color/white" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_nav_header_role" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Visiteur" android:textColor="#B0FFFFFF" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /navigation_drawer (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <menu xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" tools:showIn="navigation_view">
<group android:id="@+id/group_general" android:checkableBehavior="single"> <item android:id="@+id/nav_home" android:icon="@drawable/ic_home" android:title="@string/menu_home" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_about" android:icon="@drawable/ic_info" android:title="@string/menu_about" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_structure" android:icon="@drawable/ic_people" android:title="@string/menu_structure" /> </group>
<item android:title="@string/nav_group_content"> <menu> <group android:checkableBehavior="single"> <item android:id="@+id/nav_activities" android:icon="@drawable/ic_volunteer" android:title="@string/menu_activities" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_events" android:icon="@drawable/ic_event" android:title="@string/menu_events" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_gallery" android:icon="@drawable/ic_photo_library" android:title="@string/menu_gallery" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_documents" android:icon="@drawable/ic_description" android:title="@string/menu_documents" /> </group> </menu> </item>
<item android:title="@string/nav_group_member"> <menu> <group android:checkableBehavior="single"> <item android:id="@+id/nav_membership" android:icon="@drawable/ic_person_add" android:title="@string/menu_membership" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_contact" android:icon="@drawable/ic_contact_mail" android:title="@string/menu_contact" /> </group> </menu> </item>
<item android:title="Administration"> <menu> <group android:checkableBehavior="single"> <item android:id="@+id/nav_admin_dashboard" android:icon="@drawable/ic_admin" android:title="Tableau de bord" /> </group> </menu> </item> </menu>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <menu xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" tools:showIn="navigation_view">
<group android:id="@+id/group_general" android:checkableBehavior="single"> <item android:id="@+id/nav_home" android:icon="@drawable/ic_home" android:title="@string/menu_home" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_about" android:icon="@drawable/ic_info" android:title="@string/menu_about" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_structure" android:icon="@drawable/ic_people" android:title="@string/menu_structure" /> </group>
<item android:title="@string/nav_group_content"> <menu> <group android:checkableBehavior="single"> <item android:id="@+id/nav_activities" android:icon="@drawable/ic_volunteer" android:title="@string/menu_activities" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_events" android:icon="@drawable/ic_event" android:title="@string/menu_events" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_gallery" android:icon="@drawable/ic_photo_library" android:title="@string/menu_gallery" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_documents" android:icon="@drawable/ic_description" android:title="@string/menu_documents" /> </group> </menu> </item>
<item android:title="@string/nav_group_member"> <menu> <group android:checkableBehavior="single"> <item android:id="@+id/nav_membership" android:icon="@drawable/ic_person_add" android:title="@string/menu_membership" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_contact" android:icon="@drawable/ic_contact_mail" android:title="@string/menu_contact" /> </group> </menu> </item>
<item android:id="@+id/nav_admin_section" android:title="Administration"> <menu> <group android:checkableBehavior="single"> <item android:id="@+id/nav_admin_dashboard" android:icon="@drawable/ic_admin" android:title="Tableau de bord" /> </group> </menu> </item> </menu>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /overflow (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <menu xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:id="@+id/nav_login" android:icon="@drawable/ic_login" android:title="@string/menu_login" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_settings" android:icon="@drawable/ic_settings_black_24dp" android:title="@string/menu_settings" /> </menu>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <menu xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:id="@+id/nav_login" android:icon="@drawable/ic_login" android:title="@string/menu_login" android:visible="true" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_logout" android:icon="@drawable/ic_logout" android:title="@string/auth_logout" android:visible="false" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_settings" android:icon="@drawable/ic_settings_black_24dp" android:title="@string/menu_settings" /> </menu>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /supabase_setup (snapshot).sql

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
# Built application files *.apk *.aar *.ap_ *.aab
# Files for the ART/Dalvik VM *.dex
# Java class files *.class
# Generated files bin/ gen/ out/ release/
# Gradle files .gradle/ build/
# Local configuration file (sdk path, etc) local.properties
# Android Studio /.idea/caches/ /.idea/libraries/ /.idea/modules.xml /.idea/workspace.xml /.idea/navEditor.xml /.idea/assetWizardSettings.xml /.idea/shelf/ /.idea/httpRequests/ /.idea/codeStyles/Project.xml *.iml
# OS-specific files .DS_Store Thumbs.db
# Captures /captures
# External native build .externalNativeBuild/ .cxx/
# Keystore files (for security) *.jks *.keystore
# Google Services (contains API keys) # google-services.json
# Shared module build /shared/build/
